mnemonics: A Very Exciting Project (AVEP): Android Studio, Virtual Device, Empty Project - the three initial steps to create your first app.
keyPoints: Install Android Studio and set up the development environment.
Create a new project using the 'Empty Activity' template.
Run the application on an emulator (AVD) or a physical device.
commonMistakes: Forgetting to install the correct SDK version for the target Android API level.
Not selecting the 'Empty Activity' template, leading to confusion with pre-built code.
Failing to create or select a suitable Android Virtual Device (AVD) before trying to run the app.
